div.h2: System V AMD64 ABI Compliant State Marshaling

g.text: Stack Frame Layout during Trampoline Execution (Total Size: 208+ Bytes)

ul.li: Memory Alignment: Stack MUST be 16-byte aligned before call interpreter_loop. Failure leads to #GP on XMM move instructions in C code.
Volatile Registers: Standard System V AMD64 ABI identifies RAX, RCX, RDX, RSI, RDI, R8-R11 as volatile. The trampoline saves ALL to allow JIT to assume transparent transition.
Frame Persistence: The InterpFrame exists only on the stack for the duration of the call. Heap allocation is avoided for performance.
Exception Path: If an interrupt occurs, the saved_regs block is used to reconstruct the register set for the debugger.

text.tspan: RAX, RBX, RCX, RDX, RSI, RDI, R8-R15
